changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Discontinue usage of default query result view fields
changeSet.sql: update os_cfg_props set activity_status = 'Disabled' where module_id = (select identifier from os_modules where name = 'query') and name = 'default_result_view'

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.id: Discontinue usage of specimen imaging config props
changeSet.sql: update os_cfg_props set activity_status = 'Disabled' where module_id = (select identifier from os_modules where name = 'biospecimen') and name in ('image_url_tmpl', 'imaging')

changeSet.author: vpawar
changeSet.sql: delete from os_cfg_settings where property_id in ( select p.identifier from os_cfg_props p inner join os_modules m on m.identifier = p.module_id where m.name = 'query' and p.name = 'optimisation_settings' )
delete from os_cfg_props where module_id = (select identifier from os_modules where name = 'query') and name = 'optimisation_settings'
